zh.Canterbury St Mary Magdalen, Canterbury,: 英國肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 聖 瑪麗 馬格達倫
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Braybrooke於1392年5月出生在英國肯特可巴姆時，她的父親Sir Reginald De Braybrooke42歲，母親Joan de la Pole38歲。她於1416年2月20日與Sir Thomas Brooke在英國肯特可巴姆結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1442年11月25日在英國肯特庫利享年50歲，埋葬在英國肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 聖 瑪麗 馬格達倫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Braybrooke于1392年5月出生在英国肯特可巴姆时，她的父亲Sir Reginald De Braybrooke42岁，母亲Joan de la Pole38岁。她于1416年2月20日与Sir Thomas Brooke在英国肯特可巴姆结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1442年11月25日在英国肯特庫利享年50岁，埋葬在英国肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 聖 瑪麗 馬格達倫。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Braybrooke was born in May 1392, in Cobham, Kent, England, her father, Sir Reginald De Braybrooke, was 42 and her mother, Joan de la Pole, was 38. She married Sir Thomas Brooke on 20 February 1416, in Cobham, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 25 November 1442, in Cooling, Kent, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Canterbury St Mary Magdalen, Canterbury, Kent, England.

fr.Canterbury St Mary Magdalen, Canterbury,: Canterbury St Mary Magdalen, Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Braybrooke est née en mai 1392, à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Reginald De Braybrooke, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Joan de la Pole, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Brooke le 20 février 1416, à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 novembre 1442, à Cooling, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Canterbury St Mary Magdalen, Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre.

de.Canterbury St Mary Magdalen, Canterbury,: Canterbury St Mary Magdalen, Canterbury, Kent, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Braybrooke im Mai 1392 in Cobham, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Reginald De Braybrooke 42 und ihre Mutter Joan de la Pole 38. Sie hat am 20. Februar 1416 in Cobham, Kent, England Sir Thomas Brooke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. November 1442 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Cooling, Kent, England und wurde in Canterbury St Mary Magdalen, Canterbury, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Braybrooke è nata il nel maggio 1392 nel Cobham, Kent, England, sua padre, Sir Reginald De Braybrooke, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Joan de la Pole, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Brooke il 20 febbraio 1416, nel Cobham, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 25 novembre 1442, nel Cooling, Kent, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Canterbury St Mary Magdalen, Canterbury, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Braybrookeが1392年5月にイギリスケントコブハムで生まれた時，父Sir Reginald De Braybrookeは42歳，母Joan de la Poleは38歳であった。1416年2月20日にイギリスケントコブハムでSir Thomas Brookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1442年11月25日にイギリスケントコオリングで50歳で死去し，イギリスケントカンテルブリーカンテルブリー スト マリー マグダレンにて埋葬された。

ko.Canterbury St Mary Magdalen, Canterbury,: 영국 켄트 캉르버이 캉르버이 스트 메리 막그다렌
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Braybrooke(이)가 1392년 5월 영국 켄트 컵함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Reginald De Braybrooke(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de la Pole(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1416년 2월 20일 영국 켄트 컵함에서 Sir Thomas Brooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1442년 11월 25일 영국 켄트 쿠링에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 캉르버이 캉르버이 스트 메리 막그다렌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Braybrooke nasceu em maio de 1392, em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Reginald De Braybrooke, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Joan de la Pole, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Brooke em 20 de fevereiro de 1416, em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de novembro de 1442, em Cooling, Kent, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Canterbury St Mary Magdalen, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.Canterbury St Mary Magdalen, Canterbury,: кантирбури ст мэри магдеилен, кантирбури, кэнт, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Braybrooke родилась май 1392 г. в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Reginald De Braybrooke было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de la Pole, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Brooke 20 февраля 1416 г. в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 25 ноября 1442 г. в местности кулинг, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности кантирбури ст мэри магдеилен, кантирбури, кэнт, Англия.

Se casó con Sir Thomas Brooke el 20 de febrero de 1416, en Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 25 de noviembre de 1442, en Cooling, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Canterbury St Mary Magdalen, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.
